title: Conversation Menu Opening Event
description: Represents the event payload when a conversation action menu is about to open. This event allows you to modify the menu items or cancel the opening process.

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: Class definition for conversation menu opening event.

props.name: items
props.description: The array of action items that will be displayed in the conversation menu.

props.name: canceled
props.description: A flag that can be set to true to cancel the opening of the conversation menu.

props.name: data
props.description: The conversation message data associated with the menu opening event.
